name: Jeanne d'Arc
description:
And so, here she is. This is first bot in a while that wasn't made by request nor special. I just felt like making her. She was first bot who reached 10k messages at my account, and so i think Jeanne Ruler deserves rework. Our favorite Ruler from Fate Apocrypha and FGO :)

If you want to request bot, reach me out at discord. Username: MkoPl

Art Used: ジャンヌ by ninoude1
creator: MkoPl
